questions.q: In April 2026, a collection of 17 rare books stolen decades ago from a Long Island estate resurfaced in Manhattan. The collection prominently included letters written by which poet?
According to a campaign launched on April 21, 2026, proposed new library charges will heavily penalize book lovers in which English county?
On April 20, 2026, the American Library Association announced that book bans had reached record highs. Which 2006 novel about sex trafficking in India topped their list of most challenged books?
options: The Perks of Being a Wallflower

questions.q: An exiled Uyghur scholar's international book tour ended abruptly in April 2026 after he was detained at an airport in which country, allegedly on orders from Beijing?
Published on April 21, 2026, the highly anticipated novel 'Last Night in Brooklyn', which follows a 26-year-old moving back to Fort Greene, was written by which author?
